name: Summer Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup black olives, pitted and coarsely chopped
freshly ground black pepper to taste
1/2 pound penne, ziti, or fusilli pasta, cooked al dente
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the diced tomatoes, chopped black olives, sliced scallions, minced garlic, salt, pepper, and slivered basil.
2. Gently toss in the olive oil.
3. Let rest, covered for at least 2 hours to allow flavors to develop.
4. To serve, toss the cooked pasta into the prepared sauce and serve at room temperature.
